_dataGap: public/templates/form_1214_2025.pdf is not present. Acquire the official ITA blank PDF (טופס 1214 — בקשה לפריסת הכנסה), place at the templates path, then run `node scripts/build-field-map.mjs public/templates/form_1214_2025.pdf templates/maps/1214_2025.json` to overwrite this file with the auto-extracted field map. Until then, the route returns 503 TEMPLATE_MISSING and falls back to the positional draws defined in data/form1214_2025_fields.json.
